name: /prompt-ab accepts a prompt id and two version identifiers as positional arguments
command: mkdir -p prompts/x && printf 'name: x\n' > prompts/x/v1.0.0.md && printf 'name: x\n' > prompts/x/v1.1.0.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/prompt-ab.sh" x v1.0.0 v1.1.0 --eval-stub n=50 --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'prompt_id=x' out.txt && grep -q 'ver_a=v1.0.0' out.txt && grep -q 'ver_b=v1.1.0' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
